## updates

Update the implementation plan to include full bilingual support from the beginning.

Requirements:
- Arabic is the main default language
- English is also supported
- no hardcoded user-facing text anywhere
- all text must use translation keys
- Arabic must use RTL layout
- English must use LTR layout

Refactor any existing code you already generated to follow this before continuing with new features.
Then show me:
1. the localization structure
2. the locale switching approach
3. the files you will modify
4. any hardcoded text you found and replaced
